title: Secure first confirmed partner + (where applicable) local-community sign-off
context: All open-map-gaps packs carry verifiedNeed:false until a named humanitarian actor or local OSM community confirms the specific area, the real use, and that local stakeholders consent. Without a confirmed partner, remote mapping can be worthless or harmful. This task converts outreach-006 candidates into a confirmed first partner by securing a written agreement on area, use, validation channel, and — where a local OSM community exists for the region — community sign-off or non-objection.
objective: Secure and document the first named confirmed partner (HOT hub / Missing Maps partner / NGO / local community) with a specific area, real use, validation channel, and local-community sign-off where applicable.
acceptanceCriteria: A named HOT hub / Missing Maps partner / NGO / local community confirms a specific area and a real use in writing; contact and organization are recorded.
Contribution and validation channel is documented (TM project / MapRoulette / Notes; who validates).
Where a local OSM community exists for the region, community sign-off or non-objection is obtained and documented.
Tasks for that partner flip to verifiedNeed:true with requestor set to the confirmed partner's name/organization.
Agreement is committed as a document in the repository; reviewed by the Steward.
output: A committed partner-agreement document recording the confirmed partner name/organization, area, use statement, validation channel, local-community sign-off status, and the basis for setting verifiedNeed:true on the relevant tasks.
